subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-before-Mahdi! Say: O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Glory at its most resplendent, and by all Thy Glory which is all-glorious, to strengthen me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل مهدی قل اللهم انی اسئلک من بهائک بابهاه و کل بهائک بهی ان تویدنی
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement
